info.title: dotnet-user-secrets-retriever
info.description: A .NET tool that can be used to retrieve secrets from Azure Key Vault and add them via Secret Manager (user-secrets) for a project.

commands.name: retrieve
commands.description: Retrieve user secrets based on the provided configuration

options.name: --project
options.description: Path to project. Defaults to the current directory.

options.name: --secrets-configuration
options.description: The name of the file containing the configuration for the secrets you want to retrieve. Defaults to appsettings.usersecrets.json

options.name: --diagnostics
options.description: Enables diagnostic output. Useful for understanding authentication issues.
